LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF DAVID KNOLMAYER'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND THE DEMURRER TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES; NUMBER TWO TO STATE SEPARATELY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATION DEFENSES; NUMBER NINE TO SET FORTH FACTS THAT FORM THE BASIS FOR THE DEFENSE; NUMBER EIGHTEEN TO PLEAD SEPARATELY FACTS FOR A VOID OR VOIDABLE CONTRACT; AND NUMBER NINETEEN FOR DEFENDANT TO CONSIDER WHETHER TO RE-PLEAD. AS TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES: OVERRULED 1, 3, 8, 10, 15, 21, AND 22. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: RITA HOWELL, CSR #2542
